== Notes for [[Item:Q103452|Q103452]] ==

NOT already known son of https://www.geni.com/people/Fernando-de-Portugal-Se%C3%B1or-de-Cifuentes/6000000013984554256 & https://www.geni.com/people/Maria-de-Torres-de-Navarra-y-Solier-5%C2%AA-se%C3%B1ora-de-Villardompardo/6000000013984583043 (source PLZ)




----------

/!\ 22nd grandfather down in single direct all unsourced line down down to the new ADMN user /!\


---------

merge initialized and abandoned with all duplication conflicts for 2 months on https://www.geni.com/people/Denis-de-Portugal-Duque-de-Cifuentes-y-Escalona/6000000000709512608 king's son (solved)
---------

Source PLZ

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000044151345990

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
